infoText.p1: OpenStreetMap Italy Extracts is a service that allows you to extract data related to Italy present in the OpenStreetMap database.
infoText.p2: The data is available depending on the scale in different formats:
infoText.li3: OSMAND OBF - OsmAnd Binary Maps Format
infoText.p3: You can extract data for each Italian region, province or municipality.

p4.t1: The development of the service was funded by
